title: Floral Fluffy Portuguese Ham Stir-fry
description: A diabetic-friendly one-pot dish featuring sous-vide cooked ham in a flavorful sauce with herbs and spices for a floral and fluffy texture.

ingredients.name: Diabetic-friendly Flavored Condiments (for added flavor and sweetness if needed)

instructions: Sous-vide the ham at a temperature of 135°F for about 2 hours.
Remove the cooked ham from the bag and let it cool slightly.
Chop fresh herbs like thyme and rosemary finely.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped herbs and sauté until fragrant, around 1-2 minutes.
Add soy sauce, garlic powder, ham, and diabetic-friendly flavored condiments to the pan. Stir-fry for an additional minute or two until well combined.
Serve hot as a main course.
